game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Alien Shooter - Survive:** Players control a soldier in a top-down, fixed-screen arena, moving with a virtual joystick on the left and firing their equipped weapon with a virtual button on the right, with an optional auto-aim system. Hordes of alien monsters continuously spawn from the screen edges, increasing in density and speed every 20 seconds, and the player must eliminate them before their health points (starting at 100 HP) are depleted. Upon defeating monsters, they drop experience points and occasionally in-game currency, which are automatically collected when the player moves over them. Collecting enough experience points levels up the player, unlocking new active abilities like a 5-second temporary shield or passive upgrades such as a 10% damage increase, while currency can be spent between runs to unlock new weapons with distinct fire rates and damage outputs (e.g., a shotgun dealing 50 damage per shot). The game's objective is to survive for the longest duration or clear the maximum number of monster waves, with the run ending immediately if the player's HP reaches zero.
game_info.description: Battle through endless waves of alien monsters in this intense top-down survival shooter! Collect experience points to level up and unlock powerful abilities and upgrades. Survive as long as possible while enemies grow stronger and more numerous every 20 seconds. Your health is precious - avoid taking damage and use strategy to outlast the alien hordes!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move your soldier in all directions
Space: Fire your weapon
Z: Use active ability (unlocked at level 2)
Shift: Toggle auto-aim on/off
Enter: Start game from start screen
Esc: Pause/unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and survival test. Validates that the player can move around the arena, fire weapons, collect experience points, and interact with enemies. Tests fundamental game mechanics work correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move in a circular pattern around the arena perimeter to avoid enemies while firing continuously. Collect dropped experience points when safe. Survive for at least 30 seconds to validate basic gameplay loop.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves, fires weapon, damages enemies, collects experience, and gains at least one level. No critical errors occur. Player survives for minimum 30 seconds without health reaching zero.

TEST_2.test_description: Advanced survival and win condition test. Implements optimal strategy to survive multiple wave difficulty increases and reach a high survival time. Tests if the game becomes progressively challenging and validates extended gameplay.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use kiting tactics - maintain distance from enemies while firing. Enable auto-aim for efficient targeting. Prioritize collecting experience to level up quickly for defensive upgrades. Use active abilities strategically when surrounded. Focus on survival over aggressive play.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player survives for at least 60 seconds, experiences multiple difficulty increases (waves), reaches level 3+, and demonstrates the game's progression system. Win condition achieved by surviving 2+ minutes or until automated testing determines success.

TEST_3.test_description: Movement mechanics validation. Tests all directional movement, boundary collision, and position tracking accuracy. Ensures player stays within arena bounds and responds correctly to inputs.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Execute systematic movement pattern: move to each corner and edge of the arena in sequence. Test diagonal movement combinations. Attempt to move beyond boundaries to validate collision detection.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Player position updates correctly for all arrow key inputs. Player cannot move outside canvas boundaries. Position tracking in logs shows accurate coordinates. Movement feels responsive and predictable.
TEST_3.description: Movement mechanics validation. Tests all directional movement, boundary collision, and position tracking accuracy. Ensures player stays within arena bounds and responds correctly to inputs.
TEST_3.strategy: Execute systematic movement pattern: move to each corner and edge of the arena in sequence. Test diagonal movement combinations. Attempt to move beyond boundaries to validate collision detection.
TEST_3.expected: Player position updates correctly for all arrow key inputs. Player cannot move outside canvas boundaries. Position tracking in logs shows accurate coordinates. Movement feels responsive and predictable.

TEST_4.test_description: Combat system test. Validates weapon firing, projectile behavior, enemy damage, and enemy defeat mechanics. Tests the core shooting gameplay loop.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Stand in center and fire in all directions. Target enemies at various distances. Verify projectiles hit enemies and reduce their health. Confirm defeated enemies are removed and drop experience.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Projectiles spawn correctly when firing. Collision detection works - projectiles hit enemies and deal damage. Enemies are defeated when health reaches zero. Experience drops appear and can be collected.
TEST_4.description: Combat system test. Validates weapon firing, projectile behavior, enemy damage, and enemy defeat mechanics. Tests the core shooting gameplay loop.

TEST_5.test_description: Leveling and upgrade system test. Validates experience collection, level-up mechanics, and ability/upgrade unlocks. Ensures progression system rewards player appropriately.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Focus on defeating enemies rapidly to collect experience points. Reach multiple level thresholds. Verify upgrade choices appear. Test that selected upgrades actually improve player capabilities.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Experience bar fills correctly. Level-up occurs at proper thresholds. Upgrade selection screen appears. Applied upgrades modify player stats (damage, speed, etc.) as expected. Active abilities become available after leveling.
TEST_5.description: Leveling and upgrade system test. Validates experience collection, level-up mechanics, and ability/upgrade unlocks. Ensures progression system rewards player appropriately.
